nasb.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts, ‘This people says, “The time has not come, even the time for the house of the Lord to be rebuilt.” ’ ”

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord of hosts: These people say the time has not yet come to rebuild the house of the Lord.”

cnv.text: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘這民說，重建耶和華殿宇的時候還沒有到。’”

ccb.text: “万军之耶和华说，‘这些百姓说，重建耶和华殿的时候还没到。’”
